lore.story: Brave permafrost warrior, Bane's sworn enemy.

skill.name: Wasteland Force
skill.description:
If no damage is taken within 5s, Franco gains 10% Movement Speed, recovers 1% Max HP per second, and begins accumulating <font color="a6aafb">Wasteland Force</font> (up to 10 stacks).

Franco will consume all <font color="a6aafb">Wasteland Force</font> stacks on his next skill cast to increase the skill's damage by up to 150%.

skill.name: Iron Hook
skill.description: Franco launches an iron hook in the target direction. The hook will snag the first enemy unit hit, dealing 400<font color="fba51f"> (+100% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> and dragging them to Franco.

skill.name: Fury Shock
skill.description: Franco lashes out, dealing <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font> equal to 300 plus 4% of his Max HP to nearby enemies and slowing them by 70% for 1.5s.

skill.name: Bloody Hunt
skill.description: Franco suppresses the target enemy hero for 1.8s and strikes them 6 times over the duration, each time dealing 50<font color="fba51f"> (+70% Total Physical Attack)</font> <font color="fb1f1f">Physical Damage</font>.

skill_combo.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
skill_combo.description: Use Flicker to reach key targets for his Ultimate. Follow up with 1st Skill to extend the CC, then 2nd Skill to deal damage and slow.

skill_combo.title: LANING COMBOS
skill_combo.description: Use 1st Skill to hook the enemy into a bad position. Follow up with 2nd Skill to slow, then Ultimate to suppress and secure a kill.
